step_by_step_thinking: \boxed{A} The ability to perform transurethral resection of the prostate is heavily dependent on meticulous preoperative planning, accurate identification of anatomical landmarks, and mastery of technical skills—both of which require extensive training and practical experience. These elements suggest that surgeons' prior experience directly influences successful performance during the procedure. Therefore, the correct answer is A.
raw_response:
\boxed{A} The ability to perform transurethral resection of the prostate is heavily dependent on meticulous preoperative planning, accurate identification of anatomical landmarks, and mastery of technical skills—both of which require extensive training and practical experience.
